rows.label: tlk70000025_02_msg0002
rows.name:
The Iiran army, I mean! Weren't
you watching?! It was the
royal Iiran army, guys!

rows.label: tlk70000025_02_msg0003
rows.name:
That great spear could pierce
any foe, and that practical
light armor... It charms me!

rows.label: tlk70000025_02_msg0004
rows.name:
They are SO cool. This year
I'm definitely joining up!
